params.name: Don Quixote
params.description:
On May 12, 1615 AD, Miguel de Cervantes completed the publication of Don Quixote.
Don Quixote is a famous knight-errant novel. The plot revolves around the adventures of a member of the lowest nobility named Alonso Quijano, who reads so many chivalric romances that he either loses or pretends to have lost his mind in order to become a knight-errant. After a series of ridiculous acts, Quijano finally wakes up from his fantasy of chivalry. This book was published in the Spanish Golden Age of Li …
